highlights.description: Orchestration layer moved from agent-protocols for multi-protocol coordination
Client SDK for agents to authenticate via ID-JAG and AAuth flows
Comprehensive MkDocs documentation for all components

added.description: SDK client for agents with ID-JAG token exchange (RFC 8693) and AAuth consent flow
Orchestration unit tests for verifier and policy matcher
MkDocs documentation for orchestration layer (verifier, hybrid, policy)
MkDocs documentation for client SDK (getting-started, token-exchange, consent-flow)

changed.description: README updated with orchestration layer documentation
MkDocs navigation updated for orchestration and client sections

dependencies.description: Update `agent-protocols` to v0.6.1 (orchestration layer moved out)

highlights.description: Layered identity composition combining AAuth, ID-JAG, and SPIFFE protocols
SQLite and DynamoDB storage backends with server adapters
MkDocs documentation site with PlexusOne theme

added.description: Identity composer for linking protocol identities with binding
MkDocs site with Material theme and PlexusOne navigation

documentation.description: README with architecture diagram and usage examples
